brief_notes: Table audit PASSED: all table cells are numeric with named tests, exact df, and precise p-values throughout (dozens of chi-squared, Welch's t, ANOVA statistics). Key v3 improvements over v2 are evident in statistical richness. However, effect sizes/CIs/SDs are absent, several bibliography entries have fabricated duplicate authors (Trouche2019 lists 'Bhatt' 4x, Ciocchi2015 similar), some citekeys have wrong years (leshan2014 is actually 2018, wikenheiser2015 is 2016), no actual figures exist despite references to Fig 1-2, and some ANOVA df values (1,1) seem implausible for the described design.
